sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 60

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 60:1
items.html:
(to the question) Wine turning into blood
Every raising of MAN is through the prayers and good deeds of the lower ones. And if the lower ones afterwards return to their bad ways, they cause that those very MAN, which had already been clarified and joined to the Kedusha [holiness] in the secret of the wine that gladdens (see Answer 59), now — through the sins — fall back from the Kedusha to the Klipot, and turn there into blood, which is the nourishment of the outer ones; see Answer 30. (p. 781, Item 73; and p. 786, Item 80)
